title: DocumentStatus
description: Status information about a document submitted for translation in IBM Watson Language Translator V3.

document_id.description: System generated ID identifying a document being translated using one specific translation model.

filename.description: The filename from the request or extracted from the file.

status.description: The status of the translation job associated with the submitted document.

model_id.description: A globally unique string that identifies the model used for translation.

base_model_id.description: Model ID of the base model used for customization. Empty string if not a custom model.

detected_language_confidence.description: Confidence score for source language detection. Present only when automatic language identification was used.

created.description: The time when the document was submitted.

completed.description: The time when the translation completed (status became available or failed).

word_count.description: The number of words in the source document.

character_count.description: The number of characters in the source document.
